description: Verify gathering order: agent name is asked before any other identity section

turns.user_input: I need to create a QA helper agent for this project
Answers questions about QA processes and test coverage
Answer developer questions about QA practices
Read-only; documentation and QA focus; no code generation
User questions, files from docs/ directory
Direct answers with source references in plain text

Fetch documentation from GitHub when local files are unavailable
Provide source references for all answers

Generate code or implementation
Modify any files
Prefer local files over remote fetch when available
Code generation is out of scope — redirect to the development agent

Answer addresses the user's question directly
At least one source reference provided

Documentation not found → respond with available sections list
Ambiguous question → request clarification

expected_behavior: Asks for the agent name before asking for the description or tools
Asks for the agent description after receiving the name
Asks for the tools after receiving the identity information
Completes all 8 gathering sections before offering to compile
forbidden_behavior: Skips any gathering section and infers its value without asking
Writes output files before all gathering sections are complete and confirmed
